series_metadata.series_title: Financial Statements, Annual Reports, Audit Documentation, and Journal Entry Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Records include combined financial statements, audit reports, year-end footnote documentation, enterprise report documentation, Administrative Cost Fund, Safety & Hygiene cash flows, journal entry documentation, projections and warrant reconciliations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronic files on the I: drive in a Financial Reporting folder for 5 years then destroy. ; Paper: Retain in the Financial Reporting unit for 2 years, send to offsite storage for 3 years then destroy. If scanned and image is clear, shred securely., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
